title: Refund policy
text: Duplicate charges are refunded automatically within 5 business days once support confirms the duplication. Customers do not need to take any action beyond reporting it.

title: Finding invoices
text: Invoice history lives under Settings > Billing > Invoices. Receipts for the trailing 18 months can be downloaded as PDF from that page.

title: Support SLA
text: Severity-1 incidents (full outage, suspected data exposure) are acknowledged within 15 minutes, 24/7. Lower severities are handled during business hours.
